title: Intensely Spiced Indian Chicken Curry
description: A herbal and dense Chettinad dish featuring ground coriander, this crowd-pleaser is a gluten-free friendly option for any occasion.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until browned on all sides, about 6-8 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil to the pan.
Add the chopped onions to the pan and cook until they are lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the ground coriander, garam masala, turmeric, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the canned diced tomatoes to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the browned chicken back to the pan and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the curry for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
